zh: 訓練孩子自己穿衣服、收拾玩具等、
en: Train your child to dress themselves, put away toys, and so on.

zh: 這一方面可以養成孩子獨立的個性、
en: On one hand, this builds independence,
so they don't rely on parents for everything.

zh: 同時也不會等到小弟弟妹妹一來、
en: At the same time, when a younger sibling arrives,

zh: 父母有照顧不周的情形。
en: it reduces the chance of parents being spread too thin.
